title: Implement manager assignment center UI flow
description: Add a dedicated manager assignment center screen and detail flow that consume queue list and assignment center detail APIs, with deterministic navigation from the dashboard and stable handling of unauthorized and session-expired states.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard can navigate into a dedicated manager assignment center workspace
Assignment center screen renders real queue items with loading, empty, and retry states
Assignment detail screen renders stable assignment evidence and available manager actions
Unauthorized and session-expired flows remain deterministic and route through the existing auth screens
